attributes.title: Learning Over Time: Confidence by Provider
attributes.visState: {"title": "Learning Over Time: Confidence by Provider", "type": "vega", "params": {"spec": "{\"$schema\": \"https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v5.json\", \"title\": {\"text\": \"Free vs Paid: Is the Gap Closing?\", \"subtitle\": \"Green = avg free models (local/gemma/llama). Blue = avg paid (claude/copilot). Gap shrinking = glitch learning.\", \"fontSize\": 16, \"subtitleFontSize\": 12, \"subtitleColor\": \"#888\"}, \"data\": {\"url\": {\"%context%\": true, \"index\": \"glitch-workflow-runs\", \"body\": {\"size\": 500}}, \"format\": {\"property\": \"hits.hits\"}}, \"transform\": [{\"filter\": \"datum._source.issue != '' && datum._source.issue != null\"}, {\"filter\": \"datum._source.confidence != null\"}, {\"filter\": \"datum._source.comparison_group != ''\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum._source.comparison_group == 'local' || datum._source.comparison_group == 'gemma' || datum._source.comparison_group == 'llama' ? 'Free (local/gemma/llama)' : 'Paid (claude/copilot)'\", \"as\": \"tier\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum._source.confidence\", \"as\": \"score\"}, {\"calculate\": \"toDate(datum._source.timestamp)\", \"as\": \"time\"}, {\"calculate\": \"'#' + datum._source.issue\", \"as\": \"issue\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum._source.comparison_group\", \"as\": \"provider\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum._source.criteria_passed + '/' + datum._source.criteria_total\", \"as\": \"ratio\"}], \"layer\": [{\"mark\": {\"type\": \"line\", \"interpolate\": \"monotone\", \"strokeWidth\": 3, \"opacity\": 0.7}, \"encoding\": {\"x\": {\"field\": \"time\", \"type\": \"temporal\", \"title\": \"Time\", \"axis\": {\"labelFontSize\": 12, \"titleFontSize\": 13}}, \"y\": {\"field\": \"score\", \"type\": \"quantitative\", \"title\": \"Confidence\", \"scale\": {\"domain\": [0, 1]}, \"axis\": {\"format\": \".0%\", \"labelFontSize\": 12, \"titleFontSize\": 13}}, \"color\": {\"field\": \"tier\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"title\": \"Cost Tier\", \"scale\": {\"domain\": [\"Free (local/gemma/llama)\", \"Paid (claude/copilot)\"], \"range\": [\"#54B399\", \"#6092C0\"]}, \"legend\": {\"labelFontSize\": 14, \"titleFontSize\": 14, \"symbolSize\": 200}}}}, {\"mark\": {\"type\": \"circle\", \"size\": 100, \"opacity\": 0.6, \"tooltip\": true}, \"encoding\": {\"x\": {\"field\": \"time\", \"type\": \"temporal\"}, \"y\": {\"field\": \"score\", \"type\": \"quantitative\"}, \"color\": {\"field\": \"tier\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"scale\": {\"domain\": [\"Free (local/gemma/llama)\", \"Paid (claude/copilot)\"], \"range\": [\"#54B399\", \"#6092C0\"]}}, \"tooltip\": [{\"field\": \"issue\", \"title\": \"Issue\"}, {\"field\": \"provider\", \"title\": \"Provider\"}, {\"field\": \"tier\", \"title\": \"Tier\"}, {\"field\": \"score\", \"title\": \"Confidence\", \"format\": \".0%\"}, {\"field\": \"ratio\", \"title\": \"Criteria\"}, {\"field\": \"time\", \"type\": \"temporal\", \"title\": \"When\", \"format\": \"%H:%M\"}]}}], \"config\": {\"view\": {\"stroke\": null}}, \"autosize\": \"fit\"}"}, "aggs": []}

attributes.title: Confidence by Issue
attributes.visState: {"title": "Confidence by Issue", "type": "vega", "params": {"spec": "{\"$schema\": \"https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v5.json\", \"title\": {\"text\": \"Confidence by Issue\", \"subtitle\": \"How well did each provider solve each issue?\", \"fontSize\": 16, \"subtitleFontSize\": 12, \"subtitleColor\": \"#888\"}, \"autosize\": \"fit\", \"data\": {\"url\": {\"%context%\": true, \"index\": \"glitch-workflow-runs\", \"body\": {\"size\": 500}}, \"format\": {\"property\": \"hits.hits\"}}, \"transform\": [{\"filter\": \"datum._source.issue != '' && datum._source.issue != null\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum._source.comparison_group == 'local' ? 'Your Computer' : datum._source.comparison_group == 'claude' ? 'Claude (Cloud)' : datum._source.comparison_group == 'copilot' ? 'Copilot (Cloud)' : datum._source.comparison_group == 'gemma' ? 'Gemma (Free)' : datum._source.comparison_group == 'llama' ? 'Llama (Free)' : datum._source.comparison_group\", \"as\": \"provider\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum._source.confidence\", \"as\": \"confidence\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum._source.issue\", \"as\": \"issue\"}], \"mark\": {\"type\": \"bar\", \"cornerRadiusEnd\": 6, \"tooltip\": true}, \"encoding\": {\"y\": {\"field\": \"issue\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"title\": null, \"sort\": \"ascending\", \"axis\": {\"labelFontSize\": 13}}, \"x\": {\"field\": \"confidence\", \"type\": \"quantitative\", \"title\": \"Confidence\", \"axis\": {\"format\": \".0%\", \"labelFontSize\": 12, \"titleFontSize\": 13}}, \"color\": {\"field\": \"provider\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"title\": \"Provider\", \"scale\": {\"domain\": [\"Your Computer\", \"Claude (Cloud)\", \"Copilot (Cloud)\", \"Gemma (Free)\", \"Llama (Free)\"], \"range\": [\"#54B399\", \"#6092C0\", \"#D36086\", \"#DA8B45\", \"#B9A888\"]}, \"legend\": {\"labelFontSize\": 13, \"titleFontSize\": 14}}, \"yOffset\": {\"field\": \"provider\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"sort\": [\"Your Computer\", \"Claude (Cloud)\", \"Copilot (Cloud)\", \"Gemma (Free)\", \"Llama (Free)\"]}}, \"config\": {\"view\": {\"stroke\": null}}}"}, "aggs": []}

attributes.visState: {"title": "All Runs: Cost vs Confidence", "type": "vega", "params": {"spec": "{\"$schema\": \"https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v5.json\", \"title\": {\"text\": \"All Runs: Cost vs Confidence\", \"subtitle\": \"Sweet spot is top-left \\u2014 high confidence, low cost\", \"fontSize\": 16, \"subtitleFontSize\": 12, \"subtitleColor\": \"#888\"}, \"autosize\": \"fit\", \"data\": {\"url\": {\"%context%\": true, \"index\": \"glitch-workflow-runs\", \"body\": {\"size\": 500}}, \"format\": {\"property\": \"hits.hits\"}}, \"transform\": [{\"filter\": \"datum._source.issue != '' && datum._source.issue != null\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum._source.comparison_group == 'local' ? 'Your Computer' : datum._source.comparison_group == 'claude' ? 'Claude (Cloud)' : datum._source.comparison_group == 'copilot' ? 'Copilot (Cloud)' : datum._source.comparison_group == 'gemma' ? 'Gemma (Free)' : datum._source.comparison_group == 'llama' ? 'Llama (Free)' : datum._source.comparison_group\", \"as\": \"provider\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum._source.confidence\", \"as\": \"confidence\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum._source.total_cost_usd\", \"as\": \"cost\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum._source.total_tokens_in + datum._source.total_tokens_out\", \"as\": \"tokens\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum._source.review_pass === true ? 'pass' : 'fail'\", \"as\": \"review\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum._source.issue\", \"as\": \"issue\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum._source.workflow_name\", \"as\": \"workflow\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum._source.criteria_passed + '/' + datum._source.criteria_total\", \"as\": \"criteria_ratio\"}], \"mark\": {\"type\": \"point\", \"filled\": true, \"tooltip\": true}, \"encoding\": {\"x\": {\"field\": \"cost\", \"type\": \"quantitative\", \"title\": \"Cost (USD)\", \"axis\": {\"format\": \"$.2f\", \"labelFontSize\": 12, \"titleFontSize\": 13}}, \"y\": {\"field\": \"confidence\", \"type\": \"quantitative\", \"title\": \"Confidence\", \"scale\": {\"domain\": [0, 1]}, \"axis\": {\"format\": \".0%\", \"labelFontSize\": 12, \"titleFontSize\": 13}}, \"color\": {\"field\": \"provider\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"title\": \"Provider\", \"scale\": {\"domain\": [\"Your Computer\", \"Claude (Cloud)\", \"Copilot (Cloud)\", \"Gemma (Free)\", \"Llama (Free)\"], \"range\": [\"#54B399\", \"#6092C0\", \"#D36086\", \"#DA8B45\", \"#B9A888\"]}, \"legend\": {\"labelFontSize\": 13, \"titleFontSize\": 14}}, \"size\": {\"field\": \"tokens\", \"type\": \"quantitative\", \"title\": \"Total Tokens\", \"legend\": {\"labelFontSize\": 12}}, \"shape\": {\"field\": \"review\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"title\": \"Review\", \"scale\": {\"domain\": [\"pass\", \"fail\"], \"range\": [\"circle\", \"triangle-up\"]}}, \"tooltip\": [{\"field\": \"issue\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"title\": \"Issue\"}, {\"field\": \"workflow\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"title\": \"Workflow\"}, {\"field\": \"provider\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"title\": \"Provider\"}, {\"field\": \"confidence\", \"type\": \"quantitative\", \"title\": \"Confidence\", \"format\": \".0%\"}, {\"field\": \"cost\", \"type\": \"quantitative\", \"title\": \"Cost\", \"format\": \"$.4f\"}, {\"field\": \"criteria_ratio\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"title\": \"Criteria\"}]}, \"config\": {\"view\": {\"stroke\": null}}}"}, "aggs": []}

attributes.title: Model Usage
attributes.visState: {"title": "Model Usage", "type": "vega", "params": {"spec": "{\"$schema\": \"https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v5.json\", \"title\": {\"text\": \"Model Usage\", \"subtitle\": \"Which models are being called and how often?\", \"fontSize\": 16, \"subtitleFontSize\": 12, \"subtitleColor\": \"#888\"}, \"autosize\": \"fit\", \"data\": {\"url\": {\"%context%\": true, \"index\": \"glitch-llm-calls\", \"body\": {\"size\": 500}}, \"format\": {\"property\": \"hits.hits\"}}, \"transform\": [{\"calculate\": \"datum._source.model\", \"as\": \"model\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum._source.provider\", \"as\": \"llm_provider\"}], \"mark\": {\"type\": \"bar\", \"cornerRadiusEnd\": 6, \"tooltip\": true}, \"encoding\": {\"y\": {\"field\": \"model\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"title\": null, \"sort\": \"-x\", \"axis\": {\"labelFontSize\": 13}}, \"x\": {\"aggregate\": \"count\", \"type\": \"quantitative\", \"title\": \"Calls\", \"axis\": {\"labelFontSize\": 12, \"titleFontSize\": 13}}, \"color\": {\"field\": \"llm_provider\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"title\": \"Provider\", \"legend\": {\"labelFontSize\": 13, \"titleFontSize\": 14}}}, \"config\": {\"view\": {\"stroke\": null}}}"}, "aggs": []}

attributes.title: Cost by Step
attributes.visState: {"title": "Cost by Step", "type": "vega", "params": {"spec": "{\"$schema\": \"https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v5.json\", \"title\": {\"text\": \"Cost by Step\", \"subtitle\": \"Where is money being spent in the pipeline? (zero-cost steps hidden)\", \"fontSize\": 16, \"subtitleFontSize\": 12, \"subtitleColor\": \"#888\"}, \"autosize\": \"fit\", \"data\": {\"url\": {\"%context%\": true, \"index\": \"glitch-llm-calls\", \"body\": {\"size\": 500}}, \"format\": {\"property\": \"hits.hits\"}}, \"transform\": [{\"calculate\": \"datum._source.cost_usd\", \"as\": \"cost\"}, {\"filter\": \"datum.cost > 0\"}, {\"calculate\": \"split(datum._source.step, '/')[length(split(datum._source.step, '/')) - 1]\", \"as\": \"step\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum._source.comparison_group == 'local' ? 'Your Computer' : datum._source.comparison_group == 'claude' ? 'Claude (Cloud)' : datum._source.comparison_group == 'copilot' ? 'Copilot (Cloud)' : datum._source.comparison_group == 'gemma' ? 'Gemma (Free)' : datum._source.comparison_group == 'llama' ? 'Llama (Free)' : datum._source.comparison_group\", \"as\": \"who\"}], \"mark\": {\"type\": \"bar\", \"cornerRadiusEnd\": 6, \"tooltip\": true}, \"encoding\": {\"y\": {\"field\": \"step\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"title\": null, \"sort\": \"-x\", \"axis\": {\"labelFontSize\": 13, \"labelLimit\": 200}}, \"x\": {\"field\": \"cost\", \"type\": \"quantitative\", \"aggregate\": \"sum\", \"title\": \"Total Cost (USD)\", \"axis\": {\"format\": \"$.2f\", \"labelFontSize\": 12, \"titleFontSize\": 13}}, \"color\": {\"field\": \"who\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"title\": \"Who did it?\", \"scale\": {\"domain\": [\"Your Computer\", \"Claude (Cloud)\", \"Copilot (Cloud)\", \"Gemma (Free)\", \"Llama (Free)\"], \"range\": [\"#54B399\", \"#6092C0\", \"#D36086\", \"#DA8B45\", \"#B9A888\"]}, \"legend\": {\"labelFontSize\": 13, \"titleFontSize\": 14}}}, \"config\": {\"view\": {\"stroke\": null}}}"}, "aggs": []}

attributes.title: glitch LLM Intelligence
attributes.description: General-purpose glitch intelligence dashboard — confidence, cost, throughput, and learning trends across all workflows
